---
title: "OPALX Physics Manual"
subtitle: "Theory, numerical models, and benchmark problems"
---

# Overview

The OPALX Physics Manual documents the physical models, numerical assumptions,
and benchmark problems used in OPALX.

## Scope

- electromagnetic interactions
- photon production processes
- gamma-gamma and laser-electron benchmarks
- implementation assumptions
- validation examples

## Example equation

$$
s = 2 E_1 E_2 (1 - \cos \theta),
$$ {#eq-mandelstam-s}

See @eq-mandelstam-s for reference.
